payload.message: Check if OpenClaw Talk Mode crash fix (PR #33550 / issue #33424) has been merged and released. Steps: 1) Check PR state with gh pr view 33550 --repo openclaw/openclaw --json state,mergedAt. 2) If merged, check latest release with gh release view --repo openclaw/openclaw --json tagName,createdAt. 3) If a new release exists (newer than v2026.3.2), notify Matt that the Talk Mode fix is live and he should update OpenClaw. 4) If merged but not released yet, or not merged, stay silent (HEARTBEAT_OK style - just reply with NO_REPLY).

Check AgentMail (gaydeceiver@agentmail.to) for new unprocessed messages from Matt and spawn a dedicated Cowork task for each one. Step 1 — Poll for new messages and save to file: python3 << 'PY' import json, urllib.request key = open('/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/.env_dir/api_key.txt').read().strip() req = urllib.request.Request( 'https://api.agentmail.to/v0/inboxes/gaydeceiver@agentmail.to/messages?limit=10', headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}'} ) data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read()) with open('/tmp/am_poll_msgs.txt', 'w') as f: json.dump(data, f) print(f"Fetched {data.get('count', 0)} messages") PY Step 2 — Find unprocessed messages and save to /tmp/am_new_msgs.txt: python3 << 'PY' import json with open('/tmp/am_poll_msgs.txt') as f: data = json.load(f) processed_path = '/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/state/processed_ids.json' try: with open(processed_path) as f: processed = json.load(f) except: processed = [] new_msgs = [] for m in data.get('messages', []): is_sent = 'sent' in m.get('labels', []) is_from_matt = 'mattaabar@gmail.com' in m.get('from', '') already_processed = m.get('message_id', '') in processed if not is_sent and is_from_matt and not already_processed: new_msgs.append({ 'message_id': m['message_id'], 'subject': m.get('subject', ''), 'preview': m.get('preview', '') }) with open('/tmp/am_new_msgs.txt', 'w') as f: json.dump(new_msgs, f) if not new_msgs: print('NO_NEW_MESSAGES') else: print(f"Found {len(new_msgs)} new message(s):") for m in new_msgs: print(f" - [{m['message_id'][:20]}] {m['subject']}") PY Step 3 — If output was NO_NEW_MESSAGES, stop here. Step 4 — For each new message, do ALL of the following: a. Send an immediate acknowledgment reply: python3 << 'PY' import json, urllib.request key = open('/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/.env_dir/api_key.txt').read().strip() new_msgs = json.load(open('/tmp/am_new_msgs.txt')) config = json.load(open('/Users/mattabar/.openclaw/openclaw.json')) token = config['gateway']['auth']['token'] port = config['gateway'].get('port', 18789) for m in new_msgs: msg_id = m['message_id'] short_id = msg_id.replace('<','').replace('>','').replace('@','_').replace('.','_')[:16] session_id = f"agentmail-{short_id}" dashboard_url = f"http://127.0.0.1:{port}/#token={token}&session={session_id}" ack = f"Got it! Working on: \"{m['subject']}\"\n\nSession: {session_id}\nDashboard: {dashboard_url}\n\nI'll reply here when done." body = json.dumps({'to': ['mattaabar@gmail.com'], 'text': ack, 'html': '

' + ack.replace('\n', '

') + '

'}) req = urllib.request.Request( f'https://api.agentmail.to/v0/inboxes/gaydeceiver@agentmail.to/messages/{msg_id}/reply', data=body.encode(), headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST' ) result = urllib.request.urlopen(req).read().decode() print(f"Ack sent for '{m['subject']}': {result[:80]}") PY b. Mark all new messages as processed immediately: python3 << 'PY' import json processed_path = '/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/state/processed_ids.json' try: with open(processed_path) as f: ids = json.load(f) except: ids = [] new_msgs = json.load(open('/tmp/am_new_msgs.txt')) for m in new_msgs: ids.append(m['message_id']) ids = ids[-100:] with open(processed_path, 'w') as f: json.dump(ids, f) print('Marked processed:', [m['message_id'][:30] for m in new_msgs]) PY c. Spawn a dedicated OpenClaw session for each message: python3 << 'PY' import json, subprocess key = open('/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/.env_dir/api_key.txt').read().strip() new_msgs = json.load(open('/tmp/am_new_msgs.txt')) for m in new_msgs: msg_id = m['message_id'] short_id = msg_id.replace('<','').replace('>','').replace('@','_').replace('.','_')[:16] session_id = f"agentmail-{short_id}" prompt = f"""You are handling an AgentMail request from Matt (mattaabar@gmail.com). Message ID: {msg_id} Subject: {m['subject']} Step 1 - Read the full message body: python3 -c " import json, urllib.request key = open('/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/.env_dir/api_key.txt').read().strip() req = urllib.request.Request('https://api.agentmail.to/v0/inboxes/gaydeceiver@agentmail.to/messages/{msg_id}', headers={{'Authorization': f'Bearer {{key}}'}}) print(json.dumps(json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read()), indent=2)) " Step 2 - Execute Matt's request using all available tools and skills. If ambiguous, note your assumptions or ask for clarification. Step 3 - Write your reply to /tmp/am_reply_{short_id}.txt, then send it: python3 << 'PYREPLY' import json, urllib.request key = open('/Users/mattabar/.agents/skills/agentmail/.env_dir/api_key.txt').read().strip() reply_text = open('/tmp/am_reply_{short_id}.txt').read() body = json.dumps({{'to': ['mattaabar@gmail.com'], 'text': reply_text, 'html': '

' + reply_text.replace(chr(10), '

') + '

'}}) req = urllib.request.Request( 'https://api.agentmail.to/v0/inboxes/gaydeceiver@agentmail.to/messages/{msg_id}/reply', data=body.encode(), headers={{'Authorization': f'Bearer {{key}}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}}, method='POST' ) print(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read().decode()) PYREPLY Always reply so Matt knows the outcome.""" with open(f'/tmp/am_prompt_{short_id}.txt', 'w') as f: f.write(prompt) subprocess.Popen( ['openclaw', 'agent', '--session-id', session_id, '--message', prompt], stdout=open(f'/tmp/am_session_{short_id}.log', 'w'), stderr=subprocess.STDOUT ) print(f"Spawned session '{session_id}' for: {m['subject']}") PY
